meaning: 格温内思郡[英国威尔士郡名]
examples: Martin, of Penmaenmawr, Gwynedd, told the Daily Telegraph that in two cases he administered the lethal injections without consent.
The post offices at Bangor, Gwynedd and Cwmbran, Torfaen, will close at the beginning of April.
The SwampFlyer ride at Greenwood Forest Park near Caernarfon, Gwynedd, had been open only a week.
The latest plans are expected to go before Gwynedd council's planning committee in the new year.
